$comment: Cross-language BINARY video-frame-header fixture (Workshop 003 §Binary). 16-byte big-endian header: [u8 frameType=0x01][u8 flags(bit0=keyframe)][u16 reserved=0][u32 sequence][u64 captureTimestampMicros]. Both the TS codec (protocol-binary.test.ts) and the Swift daemon (Plan 088 Task 4.2) encode/decode these exact byte strings — this file is the binary drift guard. `captureTimestampMicros` is a decimal STRING because the u64 range exceeds JS Number safe integers (row 4 = 2^53+1, which proves the BigInt path). `hex` is the full 16-byte header, lowercase, no payload.
